message:
feat(atc): wire reservation renew + force-release as distinct ATC events (br-bn0vb.7)

- Add SynthesisEvent::ReservationRenewed and ReservationForceReleased variants
- Add engine methods note_reservation_renewed and note_reservation_force_released
- Add public wrapper functions atc_note_reservation_renewed and
  atc_note_reservation_force_released with shadow mode support
- Wire renew_file_reservations into domain event dispatch table
- Change force_release to use distinct atc_note_reservation_force_released
  instead of generic atc_note_reservation_released
- Add SessionSummary counters: reservations_renewed, reservations_force_released
- Add replay activity tracking for new event types
- Fix pre-existing elapsed_micros → atc_elapsed_micros call (E0425)
- Tests: absorb_reservation_renewed_and_force_released_events,
  derive_domain_events_from_renew_reservation_payload,
  derive_domain_events_from_renew_zero_renewed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
